source_note: Hand-verified against the actual DRHP text in prospectus.txt (Draft Red Herring Prospectus, filed Jan 16 2025 - a pre-IPO draft, price band not yet set). All amounts in ₹ million unless noted. Every figure below was independently located in prospectus.txt via grep/read, not taken from any prior LLM extraction output. Fields marked null were not found stated, and are not independently computable, in the available document text - a correct extractor should also return null/'not disclosed' for these rather than a fabricated value; that is itself part of what this fixture tests.

financial_metrics._note_on_nulls: Valuation ratios (P/E, P/B, EV/EBITDA) are not computable pre-price-band. ROE/ROCE/current ratio/debt-to-equity are named as KPIs in the document's glossary section but their computed numeric values were not located in the retrievable text - not confirmed present, so treated as unverifiable rather than guessed.

use_of_funds_inr_million.purpose: Funding capital expenditure requirements for new project in subsidiary ALCU Industries Private Limited
Repayment/prepayment, in full or part, of outstanding borrowings

use_of_funds_inr_million.note: capped at 25% of Gross Proceeds per SEBI ICDR Regulations; exact amount undisclosed pending Offer Price determination
